zh.of Carlisle, Cumberland, England: 英國英格蘭波藍德卡萊爾
zh.Carlisle, Cumberland, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭波藍德卡萊爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Magdalen Tokett於1235年出生在英國波藍德卡萊爾時，她的父親William Tokett26歲，母親Mrs. Tokett25歲。她於1249年之前與Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.在英國波藍德卡萊爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.of Carlisle, Cumberland, England: 英国英格兰波藍德卡萊爾
zh-hans.Carlisle, Cumberland, England, United Ki: 英国英格兰波藍德卡萊爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Magdalen Tokett于1235年出生在英国波藍德卡萊爾时，她的父亲William Tokett26岁，母亲Mrs. Tokett25岁。她于1249年之前与Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.在英国波藍德卡萊爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Tokett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hockett
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Hoket, apparently a diminutive (Hocc-et) of Old English Hocca; see Hock 7.
variant of Hoggett, itself either a variant of Hoggard or a diminutive of Hogge, a Middle English pet form of Roger .

nameMeanings.name: Magdalen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older English form of Madeleine , usually pronounced ‘maud-lin’. This was the usual form of the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Magdelene
meanings: Older English form of Madeleine , usually pronounced ‘maud-lin’. This was the usual form of the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Magdalen Tokett was born in 1235, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England, her father, William Tokett, was 26 and her mother, Mrs. Tokett, was 25. She married Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. before 1249, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Magdalen Tokett est née en 1235, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Tokett, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Tokett, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. avant 1249, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Magdalen Tokett 1235 in Carlisle, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Tokett 26 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Tokett 25. Sie hat vor 1249 in Carlisle, Cumberland, England Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Magdalen Tokett è nata il nel 1235 nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England, sua padre, William Tokett, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Tokett, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. prima del 1249, nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Carlisle, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドカーリスル
ja.of Carlisle, Cumberland, England: イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスル

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Magdalen Tokettが1235年にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルで生まれた時，父William Tokettは26歳，母Mrs. Tokettは25歳であった。1249年以前にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルでThomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Magdalen Tokett(이)가 1235년 영국 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Tokett(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Tokett(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1249년 이전 영국 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.of Carlisle, Cumberland, England: Carlisle, Cumbraland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Carlisle, Cumberland, England, United Ki: Carlisle, Cumbraland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Magdalen Tokett nasceu em 1235, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Tokett, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Tokett, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. antes 1249, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Magdalen Tokett родилась в 1235 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William Tokett было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Tokett, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. перед 1249 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Magdalen Tokett nació en 1235, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William Tokett, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs. Tokett, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Thomas Ralph Andrews , Esq. antes de 1249, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en su pueblo.
